title: Nomadic Style
description: Nomad Style is a NeoForge 1.21.1 modpack focused around exploration and discovery.
body:
![Nomadic Style logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ce382065364deea2d37ab83b3e19c2da0d766821.png)

# Nomadic Style!

**Nomadic Style** is a *NeoForge* 1.21.1 modpack focused around exploration and discovery.

## Camping!

![A small campsite with a tent, sleeping bag, and campfire](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4acd3e80867074d90a7dec215a1fbae0744c05be.png)

Set up a little campsite for the night, cook your food and boil drinking water over the fire!

## Sailing!

![A player sitting in a boat on the ocean](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a0531d1a3332494859cd18ecacbc2a72690bc53.png)

Build ships using the *Small Ships* mod, and sail the seven seas!

## Hiking!

![A player facing away from the camera, with a backpack and walking stick](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f1244b2f0c7bc3b2ebc7cea0950e49dd4ad41a00.png)

Grab your backpack and walking stick, and hike up mountains and along trails!

## Photography!

![A wall containing various pictures](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/dd38c6acb0f9af4e35c69ed86eaf63197a7e5b06.png)

Craft a **Camera** and some **Film**, and photograph the things you come across on your journeys!

## Patches!

![A quest book open with various quests visible](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ba97166315b7ad2da21e547d45f92024557f5607.png)

The **Patch** system is a way to see your accomplishments in quest form, similar to scouts patches! More will be added over time.

# Featured mods:

- [Let's Do] WilderNature
- [Let's Do] Camping
- Archaeological
- Better Archaeology
- Campsite Structures
- Environmental
- Exposure
- HT's TreeChop
- Small Ships
- Supplementaries
- Thirst was Taken
- YUNG's Bridges

# **Important Note**

Please install FTB Library, FTB Quests, and FTB Teams before playing.

I hope you enjoy my pack!
> StikyPiston
